title: Ackee Umami Bliss
description: A light and flavorful meal-prep Chinese dish featuring ackee in a dairy-free umami sauce, perfect for breakfast.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat. Cook the fresh grilled ackee until it’s crispy and slightly charred.

In a small saucepan, combine umami seasoning blend, soy sauce (plant-based), garlic, chili flakes, oyster sauce (or tamari), vegetable stock or water, and fresh ginger. Bring to a simmer and stir well.
Pour the sauce over the grilled ackee in the pan until it is fully coated. Let sit for 5-10 minutes while you prepare any additional components.
Garnish with a touch of sesame seeds if desired before serving.
